title: Multiple variables declared with a single type in for loops when there is the use of a package imported variable.
body:
Some of our HDL code got rejected by Verilator because it contained multiple variables declared with a single type.

```
 for (int a= 10, b=10; a > 0; a--, b--);
```

```
%Error: mf.sv:4:23: Can't find definition of variable: 'b'
    4 |       for (int a= 10, b=10; a > 0; a--, b--);
      |                       ^
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
```
code_blocks:
%Error: mf.sv:4:23: Can't find definition of variable: 'b'
    4 |       for (int a= 10, b=10; a > 0; a--, b--);
      |                       ^
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
